name: Chile Con Queso (Cheese W/chiles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the two cheeses and combine.
2. Heat the oil in a (12"-14") skillet.
3. Saute the salsa pico de gallo in the oil until the onions are transparent.
4. Set the skillet over medium-low heat.
5. Add shredded cheeses by handful, allowing each to melt before adding the next.
6. Stir in just enough cream to make a thick, smooth texture - do not let the mixture boil!
7. Transfer to a heated chafing or fondue dish.
8. Serve with tortilla chips or corn chips.
9. Stir the mixture occasionally to maintain the creamy texture.
